name: TensorFlow
description: Google's end-to-end ML platform. Strong production tooling with TF Serving, TF Lite (mobile), and TF.js (browser). Keras is its high-level API.
whyUseIt: TensorFlow excels in production deployment, especially for mobile (TF Lite) and web (TF.js). Its ecosystem includes TFX for pipelines, TF Serving for inference, and TensorBoard for visualisation.
